name: Downer Edi Limited
analysis: DOW's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$8.3300. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$8.3250, stop A$7.8705, target A$9.6885 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
